title: DIY Hanging Christmas Card Holder
summary: This DIY hanging Christmas card holder is great for hanging over the door and displaying all the cards you get each year.
description: This DIY hanging Christmas card holder is great for hanging over the door and displaying all the cards you get each year. Use scrap 1/2" or 3/4" plywood, or rip a single 8' board down and that's all you need. Check out our simple tutorial!

steps.title: Drill pocket holes
steps.body: - Start by drilling all your pocket holes at once. - Drill two pocket holes in each end of all the Row pieces - Drill two pocket holes on the 30 degree mitered end of the Right Side.

steps.title: Assemble outside frame
steps.body: - Using wood glue and pocket hole screws, attach the 30 degree mitered end of the Right Side to the long edge of the Left Side aligning the 30 degree ends. - Using wood glue and pocket hole screws, attach Row 6 flush at the bottom into the two sides.

steps.title: Add row 5
steps.body: - Using wood glue and pocket hole screws, attach Row 5 where the two ends meet the two Sides. - This should be approximately 6" up from the last row.

steps.title: Add row 4
steps.body: - Using wood glue and pocket hole screws, attach Row 4 where the two ends meet the two Sides. - This should be approximately 6" up from the last row.

steps.title: Add row 3
steps.body: - Using wood glue and pocket hole screws, attach Row 3 where the two ends meet the two Sides. - This should be approximately 6" up from the last row.

steps.title: Add row 2
steps.body: - Using wood glue and pocket hole screws, attach Row 2 where the two ends meet the two Sides. - This should be approximately 6" up from the last row.

steps.title: Add row 1
steps.body: - Using wood glue and pocket hole screws, attach Row 1 where the two ends meet the two Sides. - This should be approximately 6" up from the last row.

steps.title: Paint
steps.body: - Use green paint to paint the tree. - Use red paint to paint the clothes pins.

steps.title: Glue clothes pins
steps.body: - Using wood glue, glue all of the clothes pins onto the rows. - Use as many as you’d like on each row, but use our image as a guide.

steps.title: Hang
steps.body: - Hang an over the door hook over a door of your choice, then hang the top hole of the tree on the hook. - Fill with holiday cards all season long!

steps.title: Enjoy
steps.body: Enjoy your handiwork and tag @CharlestonCrafted on Instagram with a picture!
